brandsSection.description: It doesn't matter where or when you bought your refrigerator. Our authorized repair experts service nearly all major appliance models and manufacturers.

items.q: Why is my refrigerator not cooling?
items.a: Most often due to dirty coils, airflow issues or a faulty fan, defrost system issue. Book cooling repair to fix the malfunction.

items.q: Why is my freezer full of ice?
items.a: This usually means your defrost system isn't working. It can block airflow and stop cooling. Possible causes — door seal leak, thermostat issues. This often leads to full cooling failure if ignored.

items.q: Why is my fridge leaking water?
items.a: Water inside or under your fridge. Typically caused by a clogged drain or water line issue. Book repair to stop the leak.

items.q: Why is my refrigerator making noise?
items.a: The fridge is buzzing, clicking or rattling sounds. Possible causes are compressor issues, fan problems, or start relay failure. Early diagnosis prevents expensive damage.

items.q: Ice maker not working — can you fix it?
items.a: No ice or slow production. Possible causes — frozen waterline, valve issues, ice maker failure. Often repairable without full replacement.

items.q: Fridge not turning on at all
items.a: Your fridge is completely off. Possible causes — power issue, control board failure, compressor problem. We check simple fixes first to save you money.

items.q: Is it worth repairing a refrigerator?
items.a: Yes, especially if it's under 10 years old and repair cost is less than replacement.

items.q: How fast can you fix it?
items.a: Most repairs are completed the same day or within 24-48 hours if parts are needed.
